details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory per governance spec.
reports/board/ directory is missing. Governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to both exist.

Moltbot code still present in repository. Directory moltbot/ contains active Python modules (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). Associated scripts: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py. These are code/config hits, not documentation-only references.
